title: Hornet Removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, Brooklyn. Safe, effective nest elimination for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to residents and families in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, where tree-lined streets and historic brownstones create ideal nesting spots. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services to protect your home and loved ones from aggressive stings. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests throughout this vibrant Brooklyn neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Prospect Lefferts Gardens for years, understanding the unique pest challenges facing this historic Brooklyn community. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to remove hornet nests from brownstones, multi-family buildings, and gardens while protecting your family and neighbors.
localContext: The beautiful tree canopy along streets near Prospect Park and the mature gardens surrounding classic pre-war buildings in Prospect Lefferts Gardens provide perfect conditions for hornet nests. From Lincoln Road's bustling commercial corridor to the quiet residential blocks near the Botanic Garden, our team responds quickly to hornet problems throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: We typically respond within 24 hours for hornet removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens. Emergency same-day service is available for nests near entryways or high-traffic areas where residents are at immediate risk of stings.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requiring specialized equipment.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my brownstone or apartment building?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods that are safe for all building types common in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, including historic brownstones, limestone facades, and multi-family dwellings. Our technicians take special care to protect architectural details and residents.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity peaks from late spring through early fall in Brooklyn, with nests growing largest in August and September. However, we provide hornet removal services year-round, as nests can remain active during warm periods and pose risks even when dormant.
